# API Path Baseline

main_backend_endpoint_count=214
total_endpoint_count=214

## chat_app_server_rs endpoints (method + path)
DELETE /:application_id
DELETE /api/agents/:agent_id
DELETE /api/ai-model-configs/:config_id
DELETE /api/contacts/:contact_id
DELETE /api/conversations/:conversation_id/mcp-servers/:mcp_config_id
DELETE /api/conversations/:conversation_id/summaries
DELETE /api/conversations/:conversation_id/summaries/:summary_id
DELETE /api/conversations/:id
DELETE /api/mcp-configs/:config_id
DELETE /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/messages/:message_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages
DELETE /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/summaries/:summary_id
DELETE /api/messages/:id
DELETE /api/notepad/folders
DELETE /api/notepad/notes/:note_id
DELETE /api/projects/:id
DELETE /api/projects/:id/contacts/:contact_id
DELETE /api/remote-connections/:id
DELETE /api/system-contexts/:context_id
DELETE /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id
DELETE /api/terminals/:id
GET /
GET /:application_id
GET /api/agent_v2/status
GET /api/agent_v2/tools
GET /api/agent_v3/status
GET /api/agent_v3/tools
GET /api/agents
GET /api/agents/:agent_id
GET /api/agents/:agent_id/runtime-context
GET /api/agents/:agent_id/sessions
GET /api/ai-model-configs
GET /api/auth/me
GET /api/contacts
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/agent-recalls
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/project-memories/:project_id
GET /api/contacts/:contact_id/projects
GET /api/conversations
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/mcp-servers
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/messages
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/review-repair
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/summaries
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/:user_message_id/messages
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/:user_message_id/process
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/by-turn/:turn_id/messages
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/by-turn/:turn_id/process
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/by-turn/:turn_id/runtime-context
GET /api/conversations/:conversation_id/turns/latest/runtime-context
GET /api/conversations/:id
GET /api/fs/download
GET /api/fs/entries
GET /api/fs/list
GET /api/fs/read
GET /api/fs/search
GET /api/fs/search-content
GET /api/git/branches
GET /api/git/client
GET /api/git/compare
GET /api/git/diff
GET /api/git/status
GET /api/git/summary
GET /api/mcp-configs
GET /api/mcp-configs/:config_id/resource/config
GET /api/memory-agents
GET /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
GET /api/memory-agents/:agent_id/runtime-context
GET /api/memory-agents/:agent_id/sessions
GET /api/memory/projects
GET /api/memory/projects/:project_id/contacts
GET /api/memory/v1/messages/:message_id
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/messages

GET /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/turn-runtime-snapshots/latest
GET /api/messages
GET /api/messages/:id
GET /api/notepad/folders

GET /api/notepad/tags
GET /api/projects
GET /api/projects/:id
GET /api/projects/:id/changes
GET /api/projects/:id/changes/summary
GET /api/projects/:id/contacts
GET /api/projects/:id/run/catalog
GET /api/realtime/ws
GET /api/remote-connections
GET /api/remote-connections/:id
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/list
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/:transfer_id
GET /api/remote-connections/:id/ws
GET /api/skills
GET /api/skills/:skill_id
GET /api/skills/plugins
GET /api/skills/plugins/detail
GET /api/system-context/active
GET /api/system-contexts
GET /api/task-manager/reviews/pending
GET /api/task-manager/tasks
GET /api/terminals

GET /api/terminals/:id/ws
GET /api/ui-prompts/history
GET /api/ui-prompts/pending
GET /api/user-settings
GET /health
PATCH /api/agents/:agent_id
PATCH /api/memory-agents/:agent_id
PATCH /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id
PATCH /api/notepad/folders
PATCH /api/notepad/notes/:note_id
PATCH /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id
PATCH /api/user-settings
POST /
POST /api/agent-builder/ai-create
POST /api/agent_v2/chat/send

POST /api/agents/ai-create

POST /api/auth/login
POST /api/auth/register
POST /api/chat/stop

POST /api/code-nav/references
POST /api/contacts
POST /api/conversations
POST /api/conversations/:conversation_id/mcp-servers
POST /api/conversations/:conversation_id/messages
POST /api/conversations/:conversation_id/review-repair

POST /api/fs/mkdir
POST /api/fs/move
POST /api/fs/touch
POST /api/git/branch
POST /api/git/checkout

POST /api/git/merge

POST /api/git/stage

POST /api/remote-connections
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/disconnect
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/delete
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/download
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/mkdir
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/rename
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/:transfer_id/cancel
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/transfer/start
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/sftp/upload
POST /api/remote-connections/:id/test
POST /api/remote-connections/test
POST /api/skills/import-git
POST /api/skills/plugins/install
POST /api/system-contexts

POST /api/system-contexts/ai/evaluate
POST /api/system-contexts/ai/generate
POST /api/system-contexts/ai/optimize

POST /api/task-manager/tasks/:task_id/complete
POST /api/terminals
POST /api/terminals/:id/interrupt
POST /api/terminals/dispatch-command
POST /api/ui-prompts/:prompt_id/respond

PUT /api/ai-model-configs/:config_id
PUT /api/conversations/:id
PUT /api/mcp-configs/:config_id

PUT /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/sync
PUT /api/memory/v1/sessions/:session_id/turn-runtime-snapshots/:turn_id/sync
PUT /api/projects/:id
PUT /api/remote-connections/:id
PUT /api/system-contexts/:context_id
PUT /api/user-settings
